raw_comment:
What do you notice?
- Baseball is the only sport that has a list for managers and not head coaches.
- Baseball is the only sport listed that has people of color as a minority for both the players and managers(not head coaches).
- There are less than 50% of head coaches of color for every sport.
- Every sport has a majority of people of color players with the exception of Baseball.

What do you wonder?
- Why doesn't M.L.B. have a chart for head coaches?
- I wonder why people of color are minorities with in the baseball field?
- Why aren't there many coaches that are people of color in all fields when they are the majority players in most of them?

How does this affect your community?
- This affect my community because it includes a lot of people of color who want to have a career in league sports in the future. This graph proves that they would not be discriminated by their backgrounds and there are many league. players that might possibly have similar experiences with racism and still shining through it.

 Catchy Headline?
- Diversity in Sports Players? Why not Head Coaches
ace_sentences: Baseball is the only sport that has a list for managers.
Baseball does not have a list for head coaches.
Baseball is the only sport listed that has people of color as a minority for the players.
Baseball is the only sport listed that has people of color as a minority for managers.
Every sport has less than 50% of head coaches of color.
Every sport has a majority of people of color players.
I wonder why M.L.B. does not have a chart for head coaches.
I wonder why people of color are minorities in the baseball field.
I wonder why there are not many coaches that are people of color in all fields.
People of color are the majority players in most fields.
My community includes a lot of people of color.
Many people of color want to have a career in league sports in the future.
This graph proves that they would not be discriminated by their backgrounds.
Many league players might possibly have similar experiences with racism.
Many league players still shine through it.
The headline is Diversity in Sports Players? Why not Head Coaches.
